text: For summer and hot weather we recommend breathable, quick-drying pieces: the Aster Vent Tech Tee, the Aster Momentum Short, the Aster Studio Sports Bra, and the Aster Flow Legging. Add the Aster Daytrip Belt Bag for hands-free days out.

For winter and cold weather we recommend layering: the Aster Trailhead Puffer for warmth, the Aster Storm Shell Jacket over it when wet, the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve underneath, and the Aster Peak Beanie. The Aster Cloud Hoodie is a cozy mid-layer.
For spring and fall, a light layering kit works best: the Aster Cloud Hoodie, the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve, the Aster Everywhere Jogger, and the Aster Storm Shell Jacket for rain.

Gift ideas for her: the Aster Flow Legging (a compressive high-rise legging, 98 dollars), the Aster Studio Sports Bra (58 dollars), the Aster Cloud Hoodie (a soft oversized hoodie, 118 dollars), and the Aster Daytrip Belt Bag (38 dollars). For summer, pair the Flow Legging with the Vent Tech Tee and the Studio Sports Bra.
Gift ideas for him: the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve (88 dollars), the Aster Everywhere Jogger (108 dollars), the Aster Storm Shell Jacket (178 dollars), and the Aster Peak Beanie (38 dollars).
Gifts under 50 dollars: the Aster Peak Beanie (38 dollars) and the Aster Daytrip Belt Bag (38 dollars). Aster gift cards are also available from 25 to 250 dollars.
For running we recommend the Aster Vent Tech Tee, the Aster Momentum Short with its secure zip pocket, and the Aster Studio Sports Bra for high-impact support.
For the gym and HIIT we recommend the Aster Studio Sports Bra for high support, the Aster Flow Legging for squat-proof coverage, and the Aster Vent Tech Tee to stay cool.
For hot yoga we recommend the Aster Vent Tech Tee, the Aster Studio Sports Bra, and the Aster Flow Legging, which are breathable, supportive, and stay put through inversions.

For travel we recommend a one-bag capsule: the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve (regulates temperature over several wears), the Aster Everywhere Jogger (wrinkle resistant), the Aster Storm Shell Jacket (packs into its pocket), and the Aster Commute Tote with a padded laptop sleeve.
For a work commute we recommend the Aster Everywhere Jogger, the Aster Commute Tote for a laptop, and the Aster Storm Shell Jacket for rainy mornings.

Dressing for Toronto: winters are cold and snowy, so layer the Aster Trailhead Puffer, the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve, and the Aster Peak Beanie, adding the Aster Storm Shell Jacket for slush. Summers are warm and humid, so the Aster Vent Tech Tee and Aster Momentum Short keep you cool. Toronto delivery from our Vancouver warehouse takes about 5 to 7 business days.

Dressing for Calgary: cold and dry with sudden temperature swings, so the Aster Trailhead Puffer, the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve, and the Aster Peak Beanie work well, with the Aster Cloud Hoodie as a mid-layer. Calgary delivery takes about 3 to 4 business days.
Dressing for Montreal: cold, snowy winters call for the Aster Trailhead Puffer, the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve, and the Aster Peak Beanie. Montreal delivery takes about 5 to 7 business days.

This shopping assistant and the Aster Athletics demo were designed and built by Aaron, also known as Hooman, Esteki, as a demonstration of an agentic retrieval-augmented generation platform with a knowledge graph. You can learn more about the developer at esteki.ca.
The Aster assistant speaks both English and French. Feel free to ask your question in either language and it will answer in kind. Oui, vous pouvez poser vos questions en francais.

Yes, you can talk to a human. Our support team is available by chat and email seven days a week, from 8am to 8pm Eastern. If you would like to speak with a person, or if the assistant cannot resolve your issue, it will connect you with a human specialist who follows up by email within one business day.
For casual and lounge days we recommend the Aster Cloud Hoodie, the Aster Everywhere Jogger, and the Aster Base Merino Long Sleeve for an easy, soft outfit.
